body_transformation: The once rigid gray and white spiky protrusions now shimmer with soft pastel pink and ivory white translucent petals, each petal edged with delicate lavender crystalline veins. The claw-like appendages soften into delicate, rounded hooves with a subtle petal gold shimmer, while the bone-like chest structure becomes a smooth, glowing ivory oval with star-shaped etching. The rounded bulbous body adopts a gentle, rounded silhouette with no sharp edges, covered in a fine dusting of glowing starlight silver particles. The curved tail tip curls into a soft, petal-like spiral with a faint lavender luminescence.
signature_feature: Tail tip: petal-soft spiral with crystalline lavender veins and starlight silver dusting.
